  routine: [32m'cookDefault'[39m,
  query: [32m'-- Door010 AI parity: Dutch weighted FTS and pipeline observability\n'[39m +
    [32m'\n'[39m +
    [32m'ALTER TABLE knowledge_items\n'[39m +
    [32m'  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS search_vector;\n'[39m +
    [32m'\n'[39m +
    [32m'ALTER TABLE knowledge_items\n'[39m +
    [32m'  ADD COLUMN search_vector tsvector GENERATED ALWAYS AS (\n'[39m +
    [32m'    setweight(\n'[39m +
    [32m"      to_tsvector('dutch', coalesce(title, '')),\n"[39m +
    [32m"      'A'\n"[39m +
    [32m'    ) ||\n'[39m +
    [32m'    setweight(\n'[39m +
    [32m"      to_tsvector('dutch', coalesce(body, '')),\n"[39m +
    [32m"      'B'\n"[39m +
    [32m'    ) ||\n'[39m +
    [32m'    setweight(\n'[39m +
    [32m"      to_tsvector('dutch', coalesce(category, '')),\n"[39m +
    [32m"      'C'\n"[39m +
    [32m'    ) ||\n'[39m +
    [32m'    setweight(\n'[39m +
    [32m'      to_tsvector(\n'[39m +
    [32m"        'dutch',\n"[39m +
    [32m"        coalesce(array_to_string(tags, ' '), '')\n"[39m +
    [32m'      ),\n'[39m +
    [32m"      'B'\n"[39m +
    [32m'    )\n'[39m +
    [32m'  ) STORED;\n'[39m +
    [32m'\n'[39m +
    [32m'CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_items_search_idx\n'[39m +
    [32m'  ON knowledge_items USING gin(search_vector);\n'[39m +
    [32m'\n'[39m +
    [32m'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION search_knowledge_fts(\n'[39m +
    [32m'  search_query text,\n'[39m +
    [32m'  max_results integer DEFAULT 10,\n'[39m +
    [32m'  category_filter text DEFAULT NULL\n'[39m +
    [32m')\n'[39m +
    [32m'RETURNS TABLE (\n'[39m +
    [32m'  id uuid,\n'[39m +
    [32m'  title text,\n'[39m +
    [32m'  body text,\n'[39m +
    [32m'  category text,\n'[39m +
    [32m'  tags text[],\n'[39m +
    [32m'  source_key text,\n'[39m +
    [32m'  source_url text,\n'[39m +
    [32m'  valid_from timestamptz,\n'[39m +
    [32m'  valid_until timestamptz,\n'[39m +
    [32m'  updated_at timestamptz,\n'[39m +
    [32m'  rank real\n'[39m +
    [32m')\n'[39m +
    [32m'LANGUAGE sql\n'[39m +
    [32m'STABLE\n'[39m +
    [32m'AS $$\n'[39m +
    [32m'  SELECT\n'[39m +
    [32m'    item.id,\n'[39m +
    [32m'    item.title,\n'[39m +
    [32m'    item.body,\n'[39m +
    [32m'    item.category,\n'[39m +
    [32m'    item.tags,\n'[39m +
    [32m'    item.source_key,\n'[39m +
    [32m'    item.source_url,\n'[39m +
    [32m'    item.valid_from,\n'[39m +
    [32m'    item.valid_until,\n'[39m +
    [32m'    item.updated_at,\n'[39m +
    [32m'    ts_rank(\n'[39m +
    [32m'      item.search_vector,\n'[39m +
    [32m"      plainto_tsquery('dutch', search_query)\n"[39m +
    [32m'    ) AS rank\n'[39m +
    [32m'  FROM knowledge_items AS item\n'[39m +
    [32m'  WHERE\n'[39m +
    [32m"    item.search_vector @@ plainto_tsquery('dutch', search_query)\n"[39m +
    [32m"    AND item.review_status = 'approved'\n"[39m +
    [32m'    AND (\n'[39m +
    [32m'      category_filter IS NULL OR\n'[39m +
    [32m'      item.category = category_filter\n'[39m +
    [32m'    )\n'[39m +
    [32m'    AND (\n'[39m +
    [32m'      item.valid_from IS NULL OR\n'[39m +
    [32m'      item.valid_from <= now()\n'[39m +
    [32m'    )\n'[39m +
    [32m'    AND (\n'[39m +
    [32m'      item.valid_until IS NULL OR\n'[39m +
    [32m'      item.valid_until > now()\n'[39m +
    [32m'    )\n'[39m +
    [32m'  ORDER BY rank DESC, item.updated_at DESC\n'[39m +
    [32m'  LIMIT LEAST(GREATEST(max_results, 1), 100);\n'[39m +
    [32m'$$;\n'[39m +
    [32m'\n'[39m +
    [32m'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_pipeline_events (\n'[39m +
    [32m'  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n'[39m +
    [32m'  pipeline_key text NOT NULL,\n'[39m +
    [32m'  stage text NOT NULL,\n'[39m +
    [32m'  level text NOT NULL\n'[39m +
    [32m"    CHECK (level IN ('info', 'warning', 'error')),\n"[39m +
    [32m'  message text NOT NULL,\n'[39m +
    [32m"  metadata jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,\n"[39m +
    [32m'  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()\n'[39m +
    [32m');\n'[39m +
    [32m'\n'[39m +
    [32m'CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS ai_pipeline_events_created_idx\n'[39m +
    [32m'  ON ai_pipeline_events(created_at DESC);\n'[39m +
    [32m'\n'[39m +
    [32m'CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS ai_pipeline_events_stage_idx\n'[39m +
    [32m'  ON ai_pipeline_events(pipeline_key, stage, created_at DESC);\n'[39m,
